title: Isle of Destiny
writer: Allan Vaughan Elston, Arthur Hoerl, Robert Lively
actors: William Gargan, Wallace Ford, June Lang
plot: Society glamor girl/aviatrix Virginia Allerton decides to alter her around-the-world flight by stopping off on the Pacific isle of Palo Pango where her brother, Lieutenant Allerton is stationed with a detachment of U.S. Marines, i...
